claims.summary: Tail vibrancy begins through a C1-smooth entropy gate and the semantic lane is 48D.
claims.disposition: Verify the 0.85 gate, smoothstep implementation, dimensional ownership, and deterministic projection tests.

claims.summary: Persistent high entropy may make vibrancy feel like constant background weight rather than a transition.
claims.disposition: Preserve this as a copied-input entropy-delta replay; source mathematics alone cannot settle felt contrast.

claims.summary: Vibrancy delta, projection distribution, and clamp headroom are directly testable without changing the codec.
claims.disposition: Verify existing high-entropy, saturation, warmth, tail-ceiling, and projection-fidelity regressions.

claims.summary: Lowering the entropy gate or changing smoothstep coefficients, feature ceilings, or transport gain would alter live codec output.
claims.disposition: Hold all codec retuning behind exact Mike/operator approval with bit-for-bit compatibility evidence.
